suggestions.topic: Repricing numbers (EIP-8038, EIP-2780) final confirmation for devnet-7
suggestions.rationale: Deferred from ACDE #240 with expected revisit at this call. Final benchmark results were promised before ACDE #242 to confirm repricing numbers treated as stable in devnet-7.

suggestions.topic: EIP-8268 (storage routes in block access lists) presentation for Hegota
suggestions.rationale: Deferred from ACDE #241 with explicit expectation to present on this call. Already PFI'd but presentation was skipped due to author absence.
Deferred from ACDE #239 (over a month ago) due to presenter absence. Hegota proposal deadline is August 6, making this urgent.

suggestions.topic: Glamsterdam EIPs promotion to SFI status and testnet graduation path
suggestions.rationale: Deferred from ACDE #241 pending testing milestone confirmation. DevNet 8 is planned before testnet graduation, so SFI promotion gates next steps. Seven EIPs still awaiting Review status.

suggestions.topic: glamsterdam-devnet-7 benchmark results and DevNet 8 scope
suggestions.rationale: Devnet-7 launched July 9 and has been running ~1 week. ACDE #241 noted benchmarks were still targeting devnet-6 results. DevNet 8 is planned for final repricing validation and minor EIP cleanup.

suggestions.topic: Hegota headliner decision and proposal intake status
suggestions.rationale: August 6 submission deadline is 2.5 weeks away. FOCIL confirmed as headliner, native AA CFI'd pending convergence. Time to clarify CFI/DFI outcomes for the ~15 PFI'd EIPs and set headliner expectations.

suggestions.topic: CL non-engine method retirement (eth1 deposit path removal)
suggestions.rationale: Open action item from ACDE #241. Prysm confirmed only 4 methods still used; eth1 deposit path methods are dead code post-Pectra and planned for removal. Needs cross-client confirmation.

suggestions.topic: EIP-7928 BAL state access ordering implementation status
suggestions.rationale: Soft-committed to Tony's proposal at ACDE #239 with async decision deadline. No subsequent confirmation of final choice or implementation blockers. Likely resolved async but worth confirming.
